---
title: "SCZ vs BD1 — Fine-mapping (L=5 SuSiE + k=5 FINEMAP)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 6)
```

```{r libraries}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(patchwork)
library(biomaRt)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r paths}
DATADIR      <- "C:/Users/c1977426/OneDrive - Cardiff University/Documents/sczvsbp"
LDDIR        <- file.path(DATADIR, "ld_bd1")
SUSIEDIR     <- file.path(DATADIR, "susie_bd1")
FMDIR        <- file.path(DATADIR, "finemap_bd1")
SUMSTATS     <- file.path(DATADIR, "daner_scz_vs_bip1_1025_noduppos_hetpva.gz")
LOCI_INPUT   <- file.path(DATADIR, "loci_input_bp1.txt")
VEP_CACHE_F  <- file.path(DATADIR, "vep_cache_bd1.rds")
GENE_CACHE_F <- file.path(DATADIR, "gene_cache_bd1.rds")
L_USE        <- 5

# LD heatmap palette (matches reheatmap.R: blue–white–red diverging)
ld_pal <- colorRampPalette(c("#313695", "#74add1", "#e0f3f8", "#ffffbf",
                              "#fee090", "#f46d43", "#a50026"))(256)
```

```{r load-data}
sumstats <- fread(SUMSTATS)
sumstats <- sumstats[HetPVa > 0.05]
sumstats[, zscore := log(OR) / SE]

loci_input <- fread(LOCI_INPUT, header = FALSE,
                    col.names = c("locus_id", "chr", "start", "end"))
```

```{r mart-setup}
grch38 <- NULL
for (mir in c("useast", "uswest", "asia", "www")) {
  grch38 <- tryCatch(
    useEnsembl("ensembl", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl", mirror = mir),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (!is.null(grch38)) { message("biomaRt: ", mir); break }
}
if (is.null(grch38)) warning("All Ensembl mirrors failed — gene tracks disabled")
```

```{r helpers}
assign_y_levels <- function(genes, max_levels = 5,
                            min_center_distance = NULL,
                            min_end_distance    = 20000) {
  genes <- genes[order(genes$start), ]
  n     <- nrow(genes)
  span  <- max(genes$end) - min(genes$start)
  if (is.null(min_center_distance)) min_center_distance <- max(20000, span / 15)
  lvls  <- vector("list", max_levels)
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    placed <- FALSE
    for (j in seq_len(max_levels)) {
      if (length(lvls[[j]]) == 0) {
        lvls[[j]] <- c(lvls[[j]], i); placed <- TRUE; break
      } else {
        last <- lvls[[j]][length(lvls[[j]])]
        cd   <- ((genes$start[i] + genes$end[i]) -
                 (genes$start[last] + genes$end[last])) / 2
        ed   <- genes$start[i] - genes$end[last]
        if (cd >= min_center_distance && ed >= min_end_distance) {
          lvls[[j]] <- c(lvls[[j]], i); placed <- TRUE; break
        }
      }
    }
    if (!placed) { max_levels <- max_levels + 1; lvls[[max_levels]] <- i }
  }
  y <- rep(0, n)
  for (i in seq_along(lvls)) y[lvls[[i]]] <- i
  genes$y_level <- y
  genes
}
```

```{r load-fits}
all_fits      <- list()
fit_meta      <- list()
cs_snp_tables <- list()
ld_matrices   <- list()   # pre-load LD for heatmaps

for (i in seq_len(nrow(loci_input))) {
  locus <- sprintf("%03d", loci_input$locus_id[i])

  # Load SuSiE fit — try L=5, fall back to L=10 if rerun was needed
  fit <- NULL
  for (L_try in c(L_USE, 10)) {
    rds_path <- file.path(SUSIEDIR, sprintf("%s.susie_l%d.rds", locus, L_try))
    if (file.exists(rds_path)) {
      fit <- readRDS(rds_path)
      if (!is.null(fit$snp_ids)) break
    }
  }

  all_fits[[locus]] <- fit
  if (is.null(fit) || is.null(fit$snp_ids)) next

  has_cs <- !is.null(fit$sets$cs) && length(fit$sets$cs) > 0
  n_cs   <- if (has_cs) length(fit$sets$cs) else 0L

  fit_meta[[locus]] <- list(
    has_cs    = has_cs,
    n_cs      = n_cs,
    cs_sizes  = if (has_cs) vapply(fit$sets$cs, length, integer(1)) else integer(0),
    cs_cov    = if (has_cs && !is.null(fit$sets$coverage))
                  min(fit$sets$coverage, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    sigma2    = if (!is.null(fit$sigma2)) fit$sigma2 else NA_real_,
    converged = fit$converged,
    lead_snp  = fit$snp_ids[which.max(fit$pip)],
    lead_pip  = max(fit$pip)
  )

  if (!has_cs) next
  cs_snp_tables[[locus]] <- list()
  for (cs_i in seq_len(n_cs)) {
    idx     <- fit$sets$cs[[cs_i]]
    cs_snps <- fit$snp_ids[idx]
    cs_pips <- fit$pip[idx]
    ss_cs   <- sumstats[match(cs_snps, SNP)]
    dt <- data.table(
      SNP  = cs_snps,
      PIP  = round(cs_pips, 4),
      z    = round(ss_cs$zscore, 3),
      OR   = round(ss_cs$OR, 3),
      SE   = round(ss_cs$SE, 4),
      P    = formatC(ss_cs$P, format = "e", digits = 2),
      INFO = if ("INFO" %in% names(ss_cs)) round(ss_cs$INFO, 3) else NA_real_
    )
    cs_snp_tables[[locus]][[cs_i]] <- dt[order(-PIP)]
  }
}
```

```{r load-ld}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(loci_input))) {
  locus   <- sprintf("%03d", loci_input$locus_id[i])
  ld_file <- file.path(LDDIR, paste0(locus, ".ld.gz"))
  snp_log <- file.path(LDDIR, paste0(locus, ".snp.log"))
  if (!file.exists(ld_file)) next
  ld_snps <- if (file.exists(snp_log)) readLines(snp_log) else NULL
  LD <- as.matrix(fread(ld_file, header = FALSE))
  if (!is.null(ld_snps)) dimnames(LD) <- list(ld_snps, ld_snps)
  diag(LD) <- 1.0
  ld_matrices[[locus]] <- LD
}
```

```{r gene-fetch}
gene_cache  <- if (file.exists(GENE_CACHE_F)) readRDS(GENE_CACHE_F) else list()
unique_chrs <- unique(loci_input$chr)

if (!is.null(grch38)) {
  for (chr in unique_chrs) {
    cache_key <- paste0("chr", chr)
    if (cache_key %in% names(gene_cache)) next
    genes <- tryCatch(
      getBM(
        attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name",
                       "start_position", "end_position"),
        filters    = c("chromosome_name", "biotype"),
        values     = list(as.character(chr), "protein_coding"),
        mart       = grch38
      ),
      error = function(e) { message("Gene fetch chr", chr, ": ", e$message); NULL }
    )
    gene_cache[[cache_key]] <- genes
  }
  saveRDS(gene_cache, GENE_CACHE_F)
}
```

```{r vep-query}
vep_cache <- if (file.exists(VEP_CACHE_F)) readRDS(VEP_CACHE_F) else list()

for (locus in names(cs_snp_tables)) {
  chr_val   <- loci_input[locus_id == as.integer(locus), chr]
  chr_genes <- gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]]

  for (cs_i in seq_along(cs_snp_tables[[locus]])) {
    dt <- cs_snp_tables[[locus]][[cs_i]]

    dt[, Consequence := sapply(SNP, function(s)
      if (s %in% names(vep_cache)) vep_cache[[s]]$consequence else NA_character_)]

    dt[, Gene := {
      bp_vec <- sumstats$BP[match(SNP, sumstats$SNP)]
      sapply(bp_vec, function(bp) {
        if (is.null(chr_genes) || is.na(bp) || nrow(chr_genes) == 0) return(NA_character_)
        hits <- chr_genes[chr_genes$start_position <= bp & chr_genes$end_position >= bp, ]
        if (nrow(hits) == 0) return(NA_character_)
        syms <- hits$external_gene_name[!is.na(hits$external_gene_name) & hits$external_gene_name != ""]
        if (length(syms) == 0) return(NA_character_)
        paste(unique(syms), collapse = "; ")
      })
    }]

    cs_snp_tables[[locus]][[cs_i]] <- dt
  }
}
```

```{r plot-function}
make_locus_plot <- function(locus_num, cs_highlight = 1) {
  locus    <- sprintf("%03d", locus_num)
  li       <- loci_input[locus_id == locus_num]
  bp_start <- li$start
  bp_stop  <- li$end
  chr_val  <- li$chr

  fit    <- all_fits[[locus]]
  in_cs  <- character(0)

  if (!is.null(fit) && !is.null(fit$snp_ids)) {
    fit_pos <- sumstats[SNP %in% fit$snp_ids & CHR == chr_val, BP]
    if (length(fit_pos) > 0) {
      bp_start <- min(bp_start, min(fit_pos))
      bp_stop  <- max(bp_stop,  max(fit_pos))
    }
    if (cs_highlight > 0 && !is.null(fit$sets$cs) && cs_highlight <= length(fit$sets$cs))
      in_cs <- fit$snp_ids[fit$sets$cs[[cs_highlight]]]
  }

  ss <- sumstats[CHR == chr_val & BP >= bp_start & BP <= bp_stop]
  if (nrow(ss) == 0) return(NULL)

  pip_map <- setNames(rep(0, nrow(ss)), ss$SNP)
  if (!is.null(fit) && !is.null(fit$snp_ids)) {
    shared <- intersect(ss$SNP, fit$snp_ids)
    pip_map[shared] <- fit$pip[match(shared, fit$snp_ids)]
  }

  ss[, PIP    := pip_map[SNP]]
  ss[, in_cs  := SNP %in% in_cs]
  ss[, log10p := -log10(P)]

  cs_label <- if (cs_highlight > 0) sprintf(" CS%d", cs_highlight) else ""
  snp_plot <- ggplot(ss, aes(x = BP, y = log10p)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = in_cs, size = PIP, alpha = PIP)) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 5), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.3, 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#5D3A9B", "TRUE" = "#E66100"),
                       labels = c("FALSE" = "No", "TRUE" = "Yes")) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(bp_start, bp_stop), labels = scales::comma) +
    labs(y     = expression(-log[10](italic(p))),
         color = "In 95% CS",
         title = sprintf("Locus %d — Chr%d:%s–%s | L=5%s",
                         locus_num, chr_val,
                         formatC(bp_start, format = "d", big.mark = ","),
                         formatC(bp_stop,  format = "d", big.mark = ","),
                         cs_label)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

  chr_genes <- gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]]
  gene_plot <- NULL
  max_y     <- 1

  if (!is.null(chr_genes) && nrow(chr_genes) > 0) {
    genes <- chr_genes %>%
      filter(
        (start_position <= bp_start & end_position >= bp_start) |
        (start_position <= bp_stop  & end_position >= bp_stop)  |
        (start_position <= bp_start & end_position >= bp_stop)  |
        (start_position >= bp_start & end_position <= bp_stop)
      )

    if (nrow(genes) > 0) {
      genes <- genes %>%
        mutate(
          gene_label   = ifelse(!is.na(external_gene_name) & external_gene_name != "",
                                external_gene_name, ensembl_gene_id),
          gene_support = 0
        )

      if (any(ss$in_cs)) {
        cs_pos <- ss[(in_cs), .(BP, PIP)]
        for (k in seq_len(nrow(cs_pos))) {
          hit <- which(genes$start_position <= cs_pos$BP[k] &
                       genes$end_position   >= cs_pos$BP[k])
          genes$gene_support[hit] <- genes$gene_support[hit] + cs_pos$PIP[k]
        }
      }

      genes <- genes %>%
        mutate(start_position = pmax(start_position, bp_start),
               end_position   = pmin(end_position,   bp_stop))

      gd_y  <- genes %>% transmute(gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
                                   start = start_position, end = end_position)
      gd_y  <- assign_y_levels(gd_y)
      genes <- left_join(genes, gd_y,
                         by = c("ensembl_gene_id" = "gene_id",
                                "start_position"  = "start",
                                "end_position"    = "end"))
      max_y <- max(genes$y_level, na.rm = TRUE)

      gene_plot <- ggplot(genes, aes(x = start_position, y = y_level)) +
        geom_segment(aes(xend = end_position, yend = y_level, color = gene_support),
                     linewidth = 4) +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#8B73B5", high = "#E66100",
                             limits = c(0, 1), na.value = "#8B73B5") +
        geom_text_repel(aes(x = (start_position + end_position) / 2, label = gene_label),
                        size = 2.8, nudge_y = 0.45, direction = "x",
                        segment.color = NA, max.overlaps = Inf) +
        scale_x_continuous(limits = c(bp_start, bp_stop), labels = scales::comma) +
        scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.3, max_y + 1)) +
        labs(x = sprintf("Chr%d position (GRCh38)", chr_val), color = "Cumul. PIP") +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
              axis.title.y = element_blank())
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(gene_plot))
    snp_plot + gene_plot + plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(3, max(1.2, max_y * 0.6)))
  else
    snp_plot
}

# LD heatmap — square aspect ratio via layout(); colour bar in right panel.
# on.exit restores par/layout so subsequent ggplot2 panels are unaffected.
make_ld_heatmap <- function(locus_num) {
  locus <- sprintf("%03d", locus_num)
  LD    <- ld_matrices[[locus]]
  if (is.null(LD)) { message("No LD matrix for locus ", locus); return(invisible(NULL)) }

  n       <- nrow(LD)
  old_par <- par(no.readonly = TRUE)
  on.exit({ layout(1); par(old_par) }, add = TRUE)

  # Two-panel layout: wide heatmap | narrow colour bar
  layout(matrix(c(1L, 2L), 1L, 2L), widths = c(8, 1))

  # Panel 1 — square heatmap
  par(mar = c(2, 2, 3, 0.5), pty = "s")
  image(seq_len(n), seq_len(n), LD,
        col = ld_pal, zlim = c(-1, 1), axes = FALSE, useRaster = TRUE,
        main = sprintf("LD r matrix — locus %d  (%d × %d SNPs)", locus_num, n, n),
        xlab = "", ylab = "")

  # Panel 2 — vertical colour bar
  par(mar = c(2, 0.5, 3, 2.5), pty = "m")
  image(1L, seq(-1, 1, length.out = 256),
        matrix(seq(-1, 1, length.out = 256), nrow = 1L),
        col = ld_pal, zlim = c(-1, 1), xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n",
        xlab = "", ylab = "")
  axis(4, at = c(-1, 0, 1), labels = c("-1", "0", "1"), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.85)
  mtext("r", side = 4, line = 2, cex = 0.85)
}

# FINEMAP locus zoom — identical style to make_locus_plot but coloured by FINEMAP PIP.
# cs_snps_highlight: character vector of SNP IDs to highlight (one CS);
#                    NULL = highlight all CS SNPs from every cred file.
# cs_label: appended to plot title, e.g. " CS1"
make_finemap_plot <- function(locus_num, cs_snps_highlight = NULL, cs_label = "") {
  locus        <- sprintf("%03d", locus_num)
  li           <- loci_input[locus_id == locus_num]
  chr_val      <- li$chr
  bp_start     <- li$start
  bp_stop      <- li$end

  # Load FINEMAP per-SNP PIPs
  fm_locus_dir <- file.path(FMDIR, locus)
  snp_file     <- file.path(fm_locus_dir, paste0(locus, ".snp"))
  if (!file.exists(snp_file)) return(NULL)
  fm_snps <- fread(snp_file)   # cols: rsid, prob, log10bf, …

  # If no specific CS supplied, collect all CS SNPs from every cred file
  if (is.null(cs_snps_highlight)) {
    cred_files <- list.files(fm_locus_dir,
                             pattern = paste0("^", locus, "\\.cred[0-9]+$"),
                             full.names = TRUE)
    all_cs_snps <- character(0)
    for (cf in sort(cred_files)) {
      lines     <- readLines(cf)
      skip_rows <- grep("^index", lines) - 1
      if (length(skip_rows) == 0) next
      dat <- tryCatch(fread(cf, skip = skip_rows), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(dat)) next
      cs_cols <- grep("^cred[0-9]+$", names(dat), value = TRUE)
      for (col in cs_cols) {
        snps <- dat[[col]][!is.na(dat[[col]])]
        all_cs_snps <- union(all_cs_snps, snps)
      }
    }
  } else {
    all_cs_snps <- cs_snps_highlight
  }

  # Extend window to cover all FINEMAP SNPs
  fm_pos <- sumstats[SNP %in% fm_snps$rsid & CHR == chr_val, BP]
  if (length(fm_pos) > 0) {
    bp_start <- min(bp_start, min(fm_pos))
    bp_stop  <- max(bp_stop,  max(fm_pos))
  }

  ss <- sumstats[CHR == chr_val & BP >= bp_start & BP <= bp_stop]
  if (nrow(ss) == 0) return(NULL)

  pip_map <- setNames(rep(0, nrow(ss)), ss$SNP)
  shared  <- intersect(ss$SNP, fm_snps$rsid)
  pip_map[shared] <- fm_snps$prob[match(shared, fm_snps$rsid)]

  ss[, PIP    := pip_map[SNP]]
  ss[, in_cs  := SNP %in% all_cs_snps]
  ss[, log10p := -log10(P)]

  snp_plot <- ggplot(ss, aes(x = BP, y = log10p)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = in_cs, size = PIP, alpha = PIP)) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 5), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.3, 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#5D3A9B", "TRUE" = "#E66100"),
                       labels = c("FALSE" = "No", "TRUE" = "Yes")) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(bp_start, bp_stop), labels = scales::comma) +
    labs(y     = expression(-log[10](italic(p))),
         color = "In FINEMAP CS",
         title = sprintf("Locus %d — Chr%d:%s–%s | FINEMAP k=5%s",
                         locus_num, chr_val,
                         formatC(bp_start, format = "d", big.mark = ","),
                         formatC(bp_stop,  format = "d", big.mark = ","),
                         cs_label)) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

  chr_genes <- gene_cache[[paste0("chr", chr_val)]]
  gene_plot <- NULL; max_y <- 1

  if (!is.null(chr_genes) && nrow(chr_genes) > 0) {
    genes <- chr_genes %>%
      filter(
        (start_position <= bp_start & end_position >= bp_start) |
        (start_position <= bp_stop  & end_position >= bp_stop)  |
        (start_position <= bp_start & end_position >= bp_stop)  |
        (start_position >= bp_start & end_position <= bp_stop)
      )
    if (nrow(genes) > 0) {
      genes <- genes %>%
        mutate(gene_label   = ifelse(!is.na(external_gene_name) & external_gene_name != "",
                                     external_gene_name, ensembl_gene_id),
               gene_support = 0)
      if (any(ss$in_cs)) {
        cs_pos <- ss[(in_cs), .(BP, PIP)]
        for (k in seq_len(nrow(cs_pos))) {
          hit <- which(genes$start_position <= cs_pos$BP[k] & genes$end_position >= cs_pos$BP[k])
          genes$gene_support[hit] <- genes$gene_support[hit] + cs_pos$PIP[k]
        }
      }
      genes <- genes %>%
        mutate(start_position = pmax(start_position, bp_start),
               end_position   = pmin(end_position,   bp_stop))
      gd_y  <- genes %>% transmute(gene_id = ensembl_gene_id,
                                   start = start_position, end = end_position)
      gd_y  <- assign_y_levels(gd_y)
      genes <- left_join(genes, gd_y,
                         by = c("ensembl_gene_id" = "gene_id",
                                "start_position"  = "start",
                                "end_position"    = "end"))
      max_y <- max(genes$y_level, na.rm = TRUE)
      gene_plot <- ggplot(genes, aes(x = start_position, y = y_level)) +
        geom_segment(aes(xend = end_position, yend = y_level, color = gene_support),
                     linewidth = 4) +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "#8B73B5", high = "#E66100",
                             limits = c(0, 1), na.value = "#8B73B5") +
        geom_text_repel(aes(x = (start_position + end_position) / 2, label = gene_label),
                        size = 2.8, nudge_y = 0.45, direction = "x",
                        segment.color = NA, max.overlaps = Inf) +
        scale_x_continuous(limits = c(bp_start, bp_stop), labels = scales::comma) +
        scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.3, max_y + 1)) +
        labs(x = sprintf("Chr%d position (GRCh38)", chr_val), color = "Cumul. PIP") +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
              axis.title.y = element_blank())
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(gene_plot))
    snp_plot + gene_plot + plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(3, max(1.2, max_y * 0.6)))
  else
    snp_plot
}

# FINEMAP summary table for a locus
finemap_table <- function(locus_num, top_n = 20) {
  locus        <- sprintf("%03d", locus_num)
  fm_locus_dir <- file.path(FMDIR, locus)
  snp_file     <- file.path(fm_locus_dir, paste0(locus, ".snp"))
  if (!file.exists(snp_file)) return(invisible(NULL))

  fm_snps <- fread(snp_file)
  setorder(fm_snps, -prob)
  dt <- head(fm_snps[, .(rsid, prob, log10bf)], top_n)
  names(dt) <- c("SNP", "FINEMAP PIP", "log10BF")
  dt[, `FINEMAP PIP` := round(`FINEMAP PIP`, 4)]
  dt[, log10BF       := round(log10BF, 3)]
  dt
}
```

## Results {.tabset}

```{r tabs, results='asis'}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(loci_input))) {
  li        <- loci_input[i]
  locus     <- sprintf("%03d", li$locus_id)
  locus_num <- li$locus_id
  fit       <- all_fits[[locus]]
  meta      <- fit_meta[[locus]]

  cat(sprintf("\n\n### Locus %d (Chr%d) {.tabset}\n\n", locus_num, li$chr))

  # ── SuSiE tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  has_cs <- !is.null(meta) && isTRUE(meta$has_cs)
  n_cs   <- if (!is.null(meta)) meta$n_cs else 0L
  tabset_attr <- if (has_cs && n_cs > 0) " {.tabset}" else ""
  cat(sprintf("\n\n#### SuSiE L=5%s\n\n", tabset_attr))

  if (is.null(meta)) {
    cat("*No SuSiE result available.*\n\n")
  } else {
    sigma2 <- if (!is.na(meta$sigma2)) round(meta$sigma2, 4) else "--"
    cat(sprintf(
      "**CS:** %s &nbsp;|&nbsp; **N credible sets:** %d &nbsp;|&nbsp; **σ²:** %s &nbsp;|&nbsp; **Converged:** %s\n\n",
      ifelse(has_cs, "Yes", "No"), n_cs, sigma2, meta$converged
    ))

    if (!has_cs) {
      cat(sprintf("*No credible set. Top PIP SNP: **%s** (PIP = %.4f)*\n\n",
                  meta$lead_snp, meta$lead_pip))
      p <- tryCatch(make_locus_plot(locus_num, cs_highlight = 0), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(p)) print(p)
    } else {
      for (cs_i in seq_len(n_cs)) {
        cs_size <- meta$cs_sizes[cs_i]
        cs_cov  <- if (!is.na(meta$cs_cov)) round(meta$cs_cov, 4) else "--"
        cat(sprintf("\n\n##### CS%d\n\n", cs_i))
        cat(sprintf(
          "**CS size:** %d &nbsp;|&nbsp; **Coverage:** %s &nbsp;|&nbsp; **Region:** Chr%d: %s–%s\n\n",
          cs_size, cs_cov, li$chr,
          formatC(li$start, format = "d", big.mark = ","),
          formatC(li$end,   format = "d", big.mark = ",")
        ))

        dt <- cs_snp_tables[[locus]][[cs_i]]
        if (!is.null(dt) && nrow(dt) > 0) {
          cat(sprintf(
            '<details><summary><strong>Credible set SNPs &mdash; %d SNP%s (click to expand)</strong></summary>\n\n',
            nrow(dt), if (nrow(dt) == 1) "" else "s"
          ))
          tbl <- knitr::kable(dt, format = "html", row.names = FALSE,
                              col.names = c("SNP", "PIP", "z", "OR", "SE", "P", "INFO",
                                            "VEP consequence", "Gene(s)")) %>%
            kableExtra::kable_styling(
              bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed", "hover"),
              full_width = FALSE, font_size = 13)
          cat(as.character(tbl), "\n\n</details>\n\n")
        }

        p <- tryCatch(make_locus_plot(locus_num, cs_i), error = function(e) NULL)
        if (!is.null(p)) print(p)
      }
    }
  }

  # ── FINEMAP tab ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # Find best cred file (highest Pr(k)) and parse CS membership
  fm_cred_files <- sort(list.files(file.path(FMDIR, locus),
                                   pattern = paste0("^", locus, "\\.cred[0-9]+$"),
                                   full.names = TRUE))
  best_cred_file <- NULL; best_pr <- -1
  for (cf in fm_cred_files) {
    hdr     <- readLines(cf, n = 2)
    pr_match <- regmatches(hdr[1], regexpr("[0-9\\.eE\\+\\-]+$", hdr[1]))
    pr_val  <- if (length(pr_match) > 0) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(pr_match)) else NA_real_
    if (!is.na(pr_val) && pr_val > best_pr) { best_pr <- pr_val; best_cred_file <- cf }
  }
  fm_cs_list <- list()
  if (!is.null(best_cred_file)) {
    clines    <- readLines(best_cred_file)
    skip_rows <- grep("^index", clines) - 1
    if (length(skip_rows) > 0) {
      cdat <- tryCatch(fread(best_cred_file, skip = skip_rows[1]), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(cdat)) {
        cs_cols <- grep("^cred[0-9]+$", names(cdat), value = TRUE)
        for (col in cs_cols) {
          snps <- cdat[[col]][!is.na(cdat[[col]])]
          if (length(snps) > 0) fm_cs_list[[col]] <- snps
        }
      }
    }
  }
  n_fm_cs   <- length(fm_cs_list)
  fm_tabset <- if (n_fm_cs > 1) " {.tabset}" else ""
  cat(sprintf("\n\n#### FINEMAP k=5%s\n\n", fm_tabset))

  fm_log <- file.path(FMDIR, locus, paste0(locus, ".log_sss"))
  if (!file.exists(fm_log)) {
    cat("*FINEMAP results not found for this locus.*\n\n")
  } else {
    ll         <- readLines(fm_log)
    post_start <- grep("Post-Pr\\(# of causal", ll)
    post_lines <- if (length(post_start) > 0) ll[post_start[1]:length(ll)] else character(0)
    exp_line   <- grep("Post-expected", ll, value = TRUE)
    exp_k      <- if (length(exp_line) > 0)
      regmatches(exp_line[1], regexpr("[0-9\\.]+$", exp_line[1])) else "—"

    cat(sprintf("**Post-expected # causal SNPs:** %s\n\n", exp_k))
    cat("**Posterior Pr(k):**\n\n```\n")
    in_sec <- FALSE
    for (ln in post_lines) {
      if (grepl("Post-Pr\\(# of causal", ln)) in_sec <- TRUE
      if (in_sec) { cat(ln, "\n"); if (grepl("^\\s+5 ->", ln)) break }
    }
    cat("```\n\n")

    # Overall SNP table (collapsible) — always at parent level
    dt_fm <- finemap_table(locus_num)
    if (!is.null(dt_fm) && nrow(dt_fm) > 0) {
      cat(sprintf(
        '<details><summary><strong>Top %d SNPs by FINEMAP PIP (click to expand)</strong></summary>\n\n',
        nrow(dt_fm)
      ))
      tbl <- knitr::kable(dt_fm, format = "html", row.names = FALSE) %>%
        kableExtra::kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed", "hover"),
                                  full_width = FALSE, font_size = 13)
      cat(as.character(tbl), "\n\n</details>\n\n")
    }

    # Per-CS locus zoom plots
    if (n_fm_cs > 1) {
      for (cs_i in seq_along(fm_cs_list)) {
        cat(sprintf("\n\n##### CS%d\n\n", cs_i))
        cat(sprintf("**%d SNPs in this credible set**\n\n", length(fm_cs_list[[cs_i]])))
        p_fm <- tryCatch(
          make_finemap_plot(locus_num, cs_snps_highlight = fm_cs_list[[cs_i]],
                            cs_label = sprintf(" CS%d", cs_i)),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )
        if (!is.null(p_fm)) print(p_fm)
      }
    } else {
      p_fm <- tryCatch(make_finemap_plot(locus_num), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(p_fm)) print(p_fm)
    }
  }

  # ── LD Heatmap tab ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  cat("\n\n#### LD Heatmap\n\n")
  if (!is.null(ld_matrices[[locus]])) {
    n_snps <- nrow(ld_matrices[[locus]])
    cat(sprintf("**%d × %d LD matrix** (signed r, blue = negative, red = positive)\n\n", n_snps, n_snps))
    # Render inline — base R image() is captured by knitr
    make_ld_heatmap(locus_num)
  } else {
    cat("*LD matrix not available for this locus.*\n\n")
  }
}
```

---

<small>SCZ vs BD1 fine-mapping — Cardiff University</small>
